name: JellyAge
description: Converts media age ratings between rating systems (MPAA, BBFC, FSK, CNC, PEGI, Kijkwijzer, Nordic systems, EIRIN, KMRB, ACB, HKCAT, OFLC, Russia) using a target-system-driven mapping table. Writes to Jellyfin's CustomRating so conversions survive metadata refreshes.
overview: Target-system-driven age rating conversion for Jellyfin.
